description_long: This is a rectangular stone pedestal with a bronze bust mounted on top, situated on a square section of cobblestone pavement. The pedestal is white or light gray, with visible weathering and several instances of graffiti and inscriptions on its sides. The front face features a plaque area, a crossed-out symbol, and the words 'NO + MATIAS' in red spray paint. The other sides also display graffiti, including blue and black tags, and geometric shapes. The bust on top depicts a male figure in classical attire, rendered in dark metal. The overall structure is solid and imposing, designed to serve as a commemorative monument in an urban setting.
description: A weathered stone pedestal with a bronze bust on top, covered in graffiti and set on cobblestone pavement. The monument features plaques, inscriptions, and a prominent red spray-painted message on the front.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bust, a plaque, a crossed-out symbol, and the red graffiti 'NO + MATIAS' on the pedestal.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the bust in profile and additional graffiti, including a circular motif and faded markings.
description_view_2: Rear view displays more graffiti in blue and black, with less prominent plaque detailing and the back of the bust.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows a blue X, a large circular graffiti, and more tags near the base.
attribute_inscription: Front face has 'NO + MATIAS' in red spray paint, with other graffiti and tags in blue and black on all sides. No formal engraved inscriptions are clearly legible.
attribute_ornamentation: The only ornamentation is the bronze bust of a male figure in classical attire mounted on top of the pedestal.
attribute_base_design: The base is a rectangular stone pedestal with a slightly wider bottom section, set on a square cobblestone platform. The pedestal features plaque areas and is covered in graffiti.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is formed by the bronze bust, which is detailed and realistic, depicting a male figure from the chest up.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is immediately surrounded by a square section of cobblestone pavement.
